commands: if ($p) { Write-Output ('Running PID ' + $p.Id + ' WS=' + $p.WorkingSet64) } else { Write-Output 'Process not found after launch' }

Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Application'; ProviderName='Application Error'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddMinutes(-2)} -MaxEvents 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List
